title: Suspicious Process Creation Detection
description: Detects suspicious process creation events including execution of reconnaissance tools and living-off-the-land binaries.
author: SOC Team
aql: LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) ILIKE '%LinuxServer%' AND (payload ILIKE '%base64%' OR payload ILIKE '%/dev/tcp%' OR payload ILIKE '%mkfifo%' OR payload ILIKE '%0>&1%')
